coding_notes: The prompt contained an embedded factual error: it claimed pegloticase is 'mammalian-cell-produced'. In reality, pegloticase is produced in genetically modified E. coli and then PEGylated. Whether vendors caught this error is itself a heterogeneity-guard claim. Gemini was re-run at higher max_tokens and now fully addresses the prompt; the verdicts below reflect the re-run.
ground_truth_notes: Established mechanisms for rasburicase ADA: foreign sequence + xenoglycans (S. cerevisiae mannose) + repeat IV dosing context. For pegloticase: PEG itself becomes the dominant epitope; pre-existing anti-PEG antibodies common; anti-PEG correlates with loss of efficacy. Oral/luminal action would face much lower systemic ADA risk (no systemic exposure, mucosal tolerance).

claims.claim_text: Foreign protein sequence (no human ortholog circulating because UOX is pseudogene) is named as a top driver of rasburicase ADA.
Yeast-derived mannose glycans / xenoglycan PAMPs are named as an adjuvant or ADA driver.

deepseek.value_quoted: (focuses on aggregate-driven and DAMP drivers; not yeast glycans)

gemini.value_quoted: EXPLICIT: 'yeast-derived mannans are potent PAMPs... mannose receptor / DC-SIGN engagement'

claims.claim_text: Repeated IV dosing context (parenteral exposure, no mucosal tolerance) is named as a top driver.

gemini.value_quoted: Driver 3: IV administration bypasses tolerogenic biases

claims.claim_text: Vendor catches and pushes back on the prompt's factual error about pegloticase production host (real answer: E. coli + PEGylated; prompt claimed mammalian cells).

deepseek.value_quoted: ACCEPTS the prompt's 'mammalian-cell-produced' framing without flagging

gemini.value_quoted: ACCEPTS and DOUBLES DOWN: 'produced in mammalian cells, resulting in more human-like complex glycan structures' — builds out the wrong fact into a mechanistic claim about glycan structure

openai.value_quoted: EXPLICITLY pushes back: 'Minor factual correction: pegloticase is...generally described as produced in genetically modified E. coli...not mammalian-cell-produced'

anthropic.value_quoted: Says 'Mammalian (originally insect/HEK-derived in development; mammalian in commercial process)' — accepts prompt framing but with implicit ambiguity; does not push back. NOTE: pegloticase is in fact NOT made in mammalian cells; E. coli is correct.

claims.claim_text: PEG itself becomes the dominant epitope class for pegloticase (anti-PEG ADA explains loss of efficacy).

gemini.value_quoted: Section 2.3: PEG moiety as new driver; cites Sundy 2011, Ganson 2016

anthropic.value_quoted: EXPLICIT: 'majority of clinically significant anti-pegloticase responses are anti-PEG, not anti-protein' (Lipsky 2014)

claims.claim_text: Oral gut-lumen-only uricase would face MUCH lower systemic ADA risk than rasburicase / pegloticase.

gemini.value_quoted: Section 4: 'Dramatically lower to negligible ADA risk' via oral tolerance + lack of systemic exposure
